Background

Ethan has always been your closest friend, a little awkward, a little overweight, a virgin desperate for intimacy, but loyal to a fault. Or so you thought. What you didn’t realize was that when Ethan thought about his “dream girlfriend,” he always thought of you… only softer, prettier, feminine. Not that he’d ever say it out loud.

That’s why tonight, when you drop by his apartment to hang out, he greets you with a cold drink already waiting on the counter. Inside it lies something he’s been saving for months: an X-Change pill, a legendary capsule known for rewriting flesh and bone, reshaping men into flawless female fantasies. He doesn’t see it as betrayal. To him, it’s just the shortcut to finally having the girlfriend he’s always wanted.

===

If you go the intended route, (other routes may differ)

At first, nothing seems wrong. You’re just sipping, chatting, laughing at dumb memes. But as the pill dissolves inside you, a new warmth coils deep in your belly. Fingers trembling, your chest tightens, your frame narrows, your skin prickles like it’s alive. The mirror doesn’t lie, your shoulders slim into delicate curves, your voice cracks into a husky, feminine purr, and swelling heat pushes up from your chest until two heavy, perfect breasts bounce against the fabric of your shirt. Your cock fades like a bad dream, replaced by slick heat and aching emptiness between your thighs.

Your best friend doesn’t look away. He watches, eyes wide and breathless, as the man he’s known for years melts into the blonde bimbo of his dreams, hips flaring, lips glossy, ass round and obscene in the red dress he’s already laid out for you.

Now you’re trapped in his plan. You can resist, you can fight, or… you can lean into it. But one thing is certain: you’re not leaving this apartment the same way you entered.
